description: You are a high-precision drone surveyor preparing for a photogrammetry mission deep inside Zion Canyon. Configure GPredict to monitor GNSS satellite geometry by removing the 'Amateur' module and establishing a ground station named 'Zion_Canyon' (37.2982 N, 113.0263 W, 1300m). Set the global minimum elevation to 30 degrees to simulate terrain masking. Create a tracking module named 'GNSS_Survey' that displays only a Polar view and includes the following satellites: NAVSTAR 73 (NORAD 43873), NAVSTAR 74 (NORAD 44431), NAVSTAR 75 (NORAD 45854), GALILEO 25 (NORAD 49589), and GALILEO 26 (NORAD 49590). Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
